linting.notes: ESLint uses react-app config extended with jest, testing-library, and jest-dom plugins. Custom rules enforce Apache 2.0 license headers and import ordering. Prettier uses default config. Both run with --max-warnings=0 in CI, treating all warnings as errors.

testing.mock_patterns: Jest mocks and @testing-library/react for component tests
testing.notes: Jest tests run in two projects (pipeline-editor uses jsdom, pipeline-services uses node). Cypress integration tests require Storybook server running (yarn test:cypress handles this via start-server-and-test). Test pattern: **/*.test.{ts,tsx}. 203 unit tests pass in 31s.

ci.notes: CI runs on push and pull_request. Tests matrix: Node 12, 14, 15. Cypress integration tests require NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider. Build must succeed before tests. Yarn cache is shared across jobs.

build.notes: Monorepo with 2 packages: @elyra/pipeline-editor (built with microbundle) and @elyra/pipeline-services (built with tsc). Build takes ~20s. Uses force-resolutions preinstall hook to override security vulnerabilities.

conventions.test_naming: Jest standard: describe() blocks and test()/it() functions
conventions.import_style: Alphabetically ordered, grouped by builtin/external/internal/parent/sibling, with newlines between groups. React imports first.
conventions.notes: All source files require Apache 2.0 license header (enforced by eslint-plugin-header). TypeScript strict mode enabled.

lint_commands.notes: Passed in 2.30s - all files use Prettier code style

test_commands.notes: 203 tests passed in 22 suites, 31.64s total. 9 snapshots passed.
Not validated (would run same tests with coverage)
Not validated - requires Storybook server and Cypress binary

container_recipe.notes: Node 14 chosen to match CI matrix middle version. Peer dependency warnings are expected and safe to ignore. Build must complete before tests can run.
